fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for a purchasing activity.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the purchasing activity specified by the code.

fields.name: Drop Shipment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if your vendor ships the items directly to your customer.

fields.name: Special Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this purchase activity includes arranging for a special order.
